meta.title: GQ Coaching — Performance Coaching for Hospitality Professionals
meta.description: Online performance coaching designed for bartenders, chefs, and hospitality professionals who want more energy, a stronger physique, and real discipline despite late shifts.

hero.title: Built for people who work when others sleep
hero.subtitle: Performance coaching for hospitality professionals who want more energy, a stronger body, and real discipline — despite late shifts and inconsistent routines.
hero.note: Based in London — in-person coaching available on request

method.title: A system adapted to your lifestyle
method.m2: Nutrition that works in real hospitality life

about.title: Built by someone who knows the lifestyle
about.p1: Giuseppe Quartararo has spent years working in hospitality, experiencing firsthand the challenges of late shifts, inconsistent routines, and demanding environments.
about.p2: With a background as a personal trainer, he combines real-world experience with proven training methods to help hospitality professionals regain control of their body, energy, and discipline.
about.p3: This coaching is not built for perfect lifestyles. It is built for real ones.

results.title: Real results
results.subtitle: Transformations built through consistency, not perfection

form.title: Apply for coaching
form.name: Your name
form.success: Your request has been sent. Giuseppe will contact you soon.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

whatsapp.prefill: Hi Giuseppe, I’m interested in your coaching.
